title: Honor archive growth warning in release preflight
rawUserRequest: 再来尝试发版本；如果发现 release preflight 仍把 archiveGrowth warning 当成硬错误，先修正流程，再继续发布。

declaredIntent.summary: 让发布前审计遵循已确认的 archiveGrowth=200 warning-only 策略，同时继续硬阻断 release identity 和归档证据完整性错误。

outOfScope: Changing archive integrity rules or archiveSequence allocation
Creating or publishing a release tag or GitHub Release

sources.reason: Honors warning-only archiveGrowth policy during release preflight.
Regression coverage for warning-only archive growth and hard release identity failures.
Declares the release preflight correction boundary.

riskAssessment.reason: The correction only changes archive growth severity; source identity, freeze lifecycle, and evidence integrity remain hard checks.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized retrying release with process corrections first.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm only archiveGrowth is warning-only; source identity and evidence mismatches remain hard failures.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: check-release-preflight reads warning enforcement for archiveGrowth and reports overrun without blocking.
Release source identity, freeze lifecycle, and archive integrity failures remain blocking.
Regression tests cover both warning-only growth and hard release blockers.
The Work Item completes its full Finish/archive/PR/merge/close lifecycle.
guidelines: The existing release preflight contract remains documented by its tests and command behavior.
The correction uses existing policy parsing and does not add cross-feature imports.

intent.problem: The release preflight command still treats archiveGrowth=528 above the configured 200 threshold as a hard error even after the governance, budget, and archive layers were changed to warning-only.
constraints: Only archiveGrowth severity changes to warning-only.
Release identity, freeze lifecycle, archive pair, digest, and sequence integrity remain fail-closed.
No tag or Release mutation in this Work Item.
intent.rationale: All release gates must consume the same policy severity, otherwise the workflow remains blocked by a stale downstream gate.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized the release retry and process correction before publication.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

budgetImpact.reason: Archive growth is warning-only under the confirmed policy; this functional correction does not create a budget-only Work Item.
